# BrainX India

> BrainX India is a premier pediatric brain science, biometrics, and mental math training organization in Pune, Maharashtra.

This website provides information about child cognitive development programs, scientific biometrics (DMIT), midbrain activation (Centre Brain Ignition), mental arithmetic (Abacus), and parenting support.

## Key Navigation Links

- [Home](/#home) - Main portal and introduction to our brain science programs.
- [Origins](/#about) - The history, philosophy, and neuroscience behind BrainX.
- [Academies](/#programs) - Overview of our cognitive programs, DMIT testing, and Abacus training.
- [Partnerships](/#partners) - Information for schools, franchises, and corporate collaboration.
- [Impact](/#stories) - Clinical case studies and child progress chronicles.
- [Resources](/#resources) - Scientific references, FAQs, and sensory overstimulation diagnostics.
- [Gallery](/#gallery) - Glimpses of active centers, parent seminars, and student cohorts.
- [Contact](/#contact) - Booking details for diagnostic scan slots and counseling sessions.
